panels.framing: splash establishing shot — Yuna in profile at the ISS observation cupola, Earth's blue curvature visible through the seven-window cupola dome, control panels glowing softly to her left, a clipboard drifting in zero-g near her shoulder. Low angle, dramatic deep-space backdrop behind the cupola.
panels.pose: floating with one hand braced on a padded handhold, the other reaching toward a control panel, body angled toward the windows
panels.expression: focused, professional, faintly intrigued — eyes on a readout
panels.mood: professional calm before contact, deep-space majesty
panels.wardrobe_state: NASA/JAXA blue flight suit, zipped to collar, HOSHINO name tag on left chest, JAXA flag patch on right shoulder, mission patches intact
panels.props_in_frame: control panel with backlit indicators, floating clipboard, padded handhold

panels.framing: MCU on Yuna's face and shoulders, the cupola window reflected in her brown eyes, a faint iridescent cosmic anomaly visible as a swirl of purple-cyan light approaching through the deep-space backdrop
panels.pose: head turned slightly toward the window, attention caught, body still calm
panels.expression: curious — eyebrows raising, lips parted slightly, brown eyes wide
panels.wardrobe_state: NASA flight suit intact, collar at neck
panels.props_in_frame: cupola window edge, soft glow of approaching anomaly

panels.framing: full body of Yuna floating in the cupola, the cosmic anomaly now wrapping around her — wisps of iridescent purple-cyan-gold energy beginning to enter her body through her skin, her flight suit beginning to feel taut at the shoulders and chest. Volumetric glow surrounds her.
panels.pose: floating with arms slightly out, body straightening in suspended posture, palms turning outward as she registers the energy
panels.wardrobe_state: NASA flight suit intact but subtly straining at the deltoids and chest, fabric pulled tighter, name tag still readable
panels.props_in_frame: cosmic energy wisps, Earth backdrop blurred

panels.framing: MCU on Yuna's upper chest and shoulders, the flight suit fabric visibly tightening over her deltoids and pecs, cosmic purple-cyan energy traceries glowing on her skin where the suit doesn't cover (neck, jaw, cheek). Eyes faintly glowing iridescent.
panels.pose: head tilted up slightly, looking down at her own arms, hands floating in front of her face
panels.expression: reverent realization, lips parted, eyes half-lidded with cosmic awareness
panels.wardrobe_state: flight suit straining at shoulders, collar still buttoned, name tag visible
panels.props_in_frame: energy traceries on skin, drifting hair

panels.framing: full body of Yuna mid-transformation, the NASA flight suit now visibly straining across her widening shoulders, thicker arms, fuller bust, defined quads pressing against the suit fabric. Cosmic energy now visibly wrapping her in a swirling iridescent aura.
panels.pose: floating in the cupola, arms partly extended outward, body straightening into a confident upright posture
panels.expression: amazed and grinning faintly, eyes brighter with cosmic light
panels.wardrobe_state: flight suit pulled taut, seams stressed at deltoids and chest, suit still fully covering coverage zones
panels.props_in_frame: cosmic aura, faint volumetric particles, cupola interior softened by glow

panels.framing: region ECU on the shoulder and upper deltoid — flight suit fabric tearing open in a small split as the deltoid grows, iridescent energy bursting through the tear, cosmic skin patterns visible underneath. Glamour-lit, photoreal CGI.
panels.wardrobe_state: NASA suit ripping open at the deltoid seam, lower coverage zones not in frame (full coverage still preserved off-frame)
panels.props_in_frame: fabric fibers stretching, energy light, glowing skin patterns

panels.framing: MCU on Yuna's face, both eyes now glowing with iridescent cosmic light, hair lifted gently by ambient energy, faint star-pattern energy lines on her temples and cheeks, the cupola window behind her filled with the cosmic anomaly. Glamour beauty lighting.
panels.pose: head slightly raised, looking past camera with reverence
panels.expression: reverent, transcendent, lips just parted, a hint of a smile
panels.mood: transcendence — she has crossed a threshold
panels.wardrobe_state: flight suit collar visible at base of frame, fabric split at deltoid still showing energy bleeding through
panels.props_in_frame: cosmic anomaly visible behind her, faint particles in the air
panels.dialogue_caption: I can feel the stars now.

panels.framing: full body of Yuna at the threshold of peak — the NASA flight suit dissolving into iridescent cosmic particles around her body, the new peak-form bodysuit beginning to materialize in its place — sleek iridescent black bodysuit with star-pattern energy lines tracing across the chest, abdomen, and limbs.
panels.pose: floating upright with arms half-raised, palms open and facing outward as she accepts the form, hair lifting with cosmic currents
panels.expression: calm, accepting, a small confident smile
panels.wardrobe_state: NASA suit dissolving in iridescent particles, new black cosmic bodysuit materializing — sleek, form-fitting, star-pattern energy lines, full coverage of breasts/groin/glutes preserved
panels.props_in_frame: swirling particles, cosmic light, fully transparent transition glow

panels.framing: full body of tier-6 Yuna in the fully materialized cosmic bodysuit — iridescent black with star-pattern glowing energy lines tracing the contours of her now massively developed muscle and oversized bust, body proportions per tier-6 reinforcement ref. Hair flowing in cosmic currents, eyes glowing iridescent.
panels.pose: floating in commanding stance, one hand at her hip, the other open at her side, body angled three-quarter to camera
panels.expression: confident, regal, beautiful, brown-now-iridescent eyes glowing softly
panels.wardrobe_state: fully materialized cosmic bodysuit, sleek and form-fitting, glowing star-pattern lines, full coverage maintained
panels.props_in_frame: cosmic aura, drifting particles, cupola window with Earth visible in BG

panels.framing: HERO SPLASH — full body of tier-6 Yuna, hero pose mid-cupola with arms slightly open and palms facing outward, Earth's curvature framing her behind through the cupola windows, cosmic aura billowing around her body, star-pattern energy lines tracing her bodysuit, hair flowing with cosmic light. Dramatic low-angle hero composition.
panels.pose: hero stance — arms slightly out and away from the body, palms open and facing camera-down, head slightly back and raised, chin lifted, chest forward, body angled three-quarter
panels.expression: triumphant, transcendent, beautiful, regal — a young goddess of stars
panels.wardrobe_state: tier-6 cosmic bodysuit fully present, glowing star-patterns at peak intensity, full coverage maintained
panels.props_in_frame: Earth visible behind, cosmic aura swirling, particles drifting, full cupola interior softened by glow
